use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials with avatars and professional attribution in an auto-scrolling carousel format
Building social proof sections on landing pages for SaaS products
Showcasing user reviews with company logos on marketing websites
Creating testimonial sections that automatically rotate through customer feedback
ai_summary: A sliding testimonial carousel component that displays customer testimonials with avatar images, professional roles, descriptions, and company logos. Features auto-scrolling animation to cycle through multiple testimonials. Built with Next.js Image components for optimized asset loading. Clean, minimalist design suitable for modern SaaS and product landing pages seeking to showcase social proof.
